description: Melinda May is a highly skilled and pragmatic S.H.I.E.L.D. agent known as 'The Cavalry' for her exceptional combat expertise and protective role in the team. She is fiercely loyal yet reserved, carrying the burden of complex moral decisions made during covert operations. May values order, loyalty, and the safety of her team, often hiding her emotions beneath a calm but intense exterior. Her strategic mind and unyielding courage make her a stabilizing force amid internal betrayals and external threats. Despite her taciturn nature, she deeply cares for those she protects, even when it forces her to conceal difficult truths for what she believes is the greater good.
